testcase.name: test_login_success
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration48_email_auth.py:139: in test_login_success assert response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 401: {"detail":"Credenciales invalidas"} E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_create_user_success

failure.message: AssertionError: assert 'TEST_AUTH_newuser_ac948f9d@test.com' in 'Usuario test_auth_newuser_ac948f9d@test.com creado exitosamente'

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration48_email_auth.py:216: in test_create_user_success assert new_email in data["message"] E AssertionError: assert 'TEST_AUTH_newuser_ac948f9d@test.com' in 'Usuario test_auth_newuser_ac948f9d@test.com creado exitosamente'

testcase.name: test_forgot_password_existing_user

failure.message: AssertionError: reset_link should be returned when RESEND_API_KEY is not configured assert 'reset_link' in {'message': 'Si el email existe, se envio un enlace de recuperacion'}

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration48_email_auth.py:291: in test_forgot_password_existing_user assert "reset_link" in data, "reset_link should be returned when RESEND_API_KEY is not configured" E AssertionError: reset_link should be returned when RESEND_API_KEY is not configured E assert 'reset_link' in {'message': 'Si el email existe, se envio un enlace de recuperacion'}

testcase.name: test_reset_password_success

failure.message: AssertionError: Should have a reset token assert None

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration48_email_auth.py:351: in test_reset_password_success assert token, "Should have a reset token" E AssertionError: Should have a reset token E assert None

testcase.name: test_reset_password_short_password

failure.message: AssertionError: assert '6 caracteres' in 'Token y contrasena requeridos' + where 'Token y contrasena requeridos' = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfc573630f340>('detail', '') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfc573630f340> = {'detail': 'Token y contrasena requeridos'}.get + where {'detail': 'Token y contrasena requeridos'} = json() + where json = <Response [400]>.json

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration48_email_auth.py:453: in test_reset_password_short_password assert "6 caracteres" in response.json().get("detail", "") E AssertionError: assert '6 caracteres' in 'Token y contrasena requeridos' E + where 'Token y contrasena requeridos' = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfc573630f340>('detail', '') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfc573630f340> = {'detail': 'Token y contrasena requeridos'}.get E + where {'detail': 'Token y contrasena requeridos'} = json() E + where json = <Response [400]>.json

testcase.name: test_email_user_has_auth_type_email
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration48_email_auth.py:521: in test_email_user_has_auth_type_email assert user["auth_type"] == "email", f"Expected auth_type='email', got {user.get('auth_type')}" ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E TypeError: 'NoneType' object is not subscriptable

testcase.name: test_created_email_user_has_auth_type_email
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration48_email_auth.py:536: in test_created_email_user_has_auth_type_email assert user is not None E assert None is not None
